name: Paladin: Smite and Heal — Divine Smite + Lay on Hands + Extra Attack
description: A level 5 Devotion Paladin fights a Fiend Brute, using Divine Smite (post-hit on-hit enhancement, 2d8 radiant, costs L1 slot + bonus action) and Lay on Hands (bonus action self-heal from 25 HP pool). Extra Attack provides 2 smite opportunities per round. Tests smite opt-in flow (eligibleEnhancements on hit → 'with divine smite' in damage text), spell slot depletion, LoH pool tracking, and bonus action contention (can't smite + LoH same turn).

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description: After hit, expend spell slot + bonus action for 2d8 radiant (L1)

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.description: Bonus action: heal from pool of 25 HP (5 × level)

monsters.comment: Fiend Brute — high HP to survive 3 rounds. Melee attacks to damage paladin for LoH testing.
monsters.name: Fiend Brute

actions.comment: === ROUND 1: Extra Attack + Divine Smite on first hit ===

input.text: I draw my blade and face the fiend

actions.comment: Paladin rolls 20 → goes first.
R1: Attack Fiend Brute with Longsword. Normal attack, no smite declared in action text.
Attack roll: 14 + 6 = 20 vs AC 13 → hit. Server should show eligibleEnhancements with divine-smite.
Damage: 5 + 3 = 8 slashing, plus opt-in Divine Smite (2d8 radiant, auto-rolled). Costs L1 slot + bonus action.
Verify L1 slot consumed by Divine Smite: 4 → 3.
Verify Fiend took at least 10 damage (8 base + 2 min from 2d8 smite).
Queue Fiend to attack paladin. Include attackName.
End R1. Bonus action was consumed by Divine Smite, so no LoH this turn.
=== ROUND 2: Attack without smite + Lay on Hands (bonus action heal) ===
R2: Attack Fiend Brute again. No smite this round — save bonus action for LoH.
Attack: 12 + 6 = 18 vs AC 13 → hit. Server shows eligibleEnhancements but we decline.
Damage: 6 + 3 = 9 slashing. NO 'with divine smite' → no smite this time.
Verify NO slot consumed this round (still 3 L1 slots).
R2 bonus: Lay on Hands (self-heal). Paladin took damage from Fiend in R1.
Verify LoH pool reduced. Paladin healed up to missing HP (capped by pool).
Queue Fiend R2 attack.
End R2.
=== ROUND 3: Attack with Divine Smite (bonus action limits 1 smite/turn in 2024) ===
R3: Attack with smite again.
Attack: 15 + 6 = 21 vs AC 13 → hit.
Damage: 7 + 3 = 10 slashing + Divine Smite 2d8 radiant. Slot 3 → 2.
Verify L1 slot consumed: 3 → 2.
Verify Fiend still alive but badly hurt.
